description: Talk to the scheduler — create, manage, and monitor scheduled agent tasks through natural conversation; results render as an interactive scheduling canvas in the chat

tool_definition.name: TDA_Scheduler
tool_definition.description: Manages scheduled tasks. Call when user wants to schedule, automate, list, cancel, pause, resume, trigger, or inspect task history.

name.description: Task name (e.g. 'Daily Sales Report'). Required for create.

prompt.description: Query the agent will run on schedule. Required for create.

schedule.description: Cron (e.g. '0 9 * * *') or interval (e.g. 'interval:1h', 'interval:30m'). Required for create.

max_tokens_per_run.description: Token budget per run. Null = unlimited.

session_context.description: 'new' (default — fresh session each run, no history) | 'current' (run inside the user's current session, inheriting conversation history and profile context). Ask the user which they prefer when creating a task.

intensity_tooltips.medium: Use TDA_Scheduler when user explicitly asks about scheduling
intensity_tooltips.heavy: Proactively suggest scheduling for recurring or time-based queries
